title: VERBUM Corpus Analysis
text:
This interactive website presents analysis of the VERBUM corpus, examining age definitions and their relationship with gender and terminology.



Interactive Tables: Search, sort, and filter the complete dataset
Visualizations: Age distribution patterns across different terms
Cross-references: Linked primary sources for each entry




Use the sidebar to explore:

📊 Interactive Tables - Full dataset with filtering
📈 Plots - Visual analysis of age definitions
